response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of polyglot development experience, including developer tooling (CI/CD setup, test frameworks like Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium courses) and craftsmanship practices (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development). However, the role requires a Level II Manager with 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of direct reports, performance management, one-on-ones, or team leadership responsibilities. There is also no mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale (brief iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016 only), which is central to this role.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built test runners, assertion libraries, CI/GitLab/Docker infrastructure, and ran TDD/Selenium training
15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded with strong craftsmanship practices
Demonstrated ability to teach and influence engineers via workshops, dojos, and conference talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience — resume shows IC roles only, missing the required 2+ years managing a team
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem exposure; brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015 doesn't match a major mobile platform org
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning team roadmaps/performance expectations

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure depth
